name: dentalcare
description: Site vitrine statique du cabinet Paro-Spé (HTML/CSS/JS, GitHub Pages).

scripts.dev:refresh: npm run -s css:bundle && npm run -s css:minify && npm run -s icons:sync-inline && npm run -s js:bundle && npm run -s js:minify
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run -s dev:refresh && npm run -s images:responsive && npm run -s images:cleanup && npm run -s images:check && npm run -s sw:bump
scripts.css:bundle: cat css/variables.css css/reset.css css/layout.css css/typography.css css/atomes.css css/navigation.css css/hero.css css/sections.css css/cabinet-carousel.css css/contact.css css/footer.css css/sidebar.css css/utilities.css > css/bundle.css
scripts.js:bundle: esbuild js/src/carousel/index.js --bundle --format=iife --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* Généré — ne pas éditer. Source: js/src/carousel/ — npm run js:bundle */" --outfile=js/cabinet-media-carousel.js
scripts.js:minify: esbuild js/script.js --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* Généré — ne pas éditer. Source: js/script.js — npm run dev:refresh */" --outfile=js/script.min.js && esbuild js/cabinet-media-carousel.js --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* Généré — ne pas éditer. Source: js/src/carousel/ — npm run dev:refresh */" --outfile=js/cabinet-media-carousel.min.js
scripts.pwa:head: node scripts/ensure-pwa-head.mjs
